config_contents:
diagnostics:
  field_dump_interval: 500
  mode: analysis
  particle_dump_interval: 5000
dt_multiplier: 0.95
keep_checkpoints: false
nozzle:
  coils:
  - I: 50000.0
    r: 0.15
    z: 0.0
  - I: 30000.0
    r: 0.25
    z: 0.3
  domain:
    r_max: 0.8
    z_max: 2.0
    z_min: -0.5
  resolution:
    geometry: 2d_rz
    np_phi: 1
    nr: 256
    nz: 512
  type: converging_diverging
output_dir: results/sunbird
plasma:
  T_e_eV: 2000.0
  T_i_eV: 5000.0
  electron_model: kinetic
  mass_ratio: null
  n0: 1.0e+19
  neutrals: null
  species:
  - D+
  - e-
  v_injection_ms: 200000.0
random_seed: null
timesteps: 50000
hardware:
Platform: darwin (arm64)
CPU cores: 12
Apple Silicon: Apple M4 Pro
MLX: 0.31.0
WarpX Metal: /Users/lulzx/work/warpx-metal
Recommended backend: metal
OMP threads: 12
